q: The SI unit of linear displacement is _______.
If the angular speed is constant, there is no tangential _______.
In a _______ motion, the object just moves in a circle.
The _______ acceleration and the tangential velocity are perpendicular to each other at every point in a circular motion.
The SI unit of angular acceleration is _______.
The direction of the tangential acceleration is _______ to the circular path.
In the right-hand rule for the direction of angular velocity, the fingers point in the direction of _______.
The ratio of the linear velocity to the angular velocity of a body in circular motion is the _______ of the circular path.
The _______ of the earth about its axis creates days and nights.
The centripetal acceleration is also known as _______ acceleration.
If a rigid body is in rotational motion, all the particles constituting it undergo _______ motion about a common axis.
The direction of the angular velocity is _______ to the plane of rotation.
The direction of the linear velocity of a particle in circular motion is _______ to the path.
In a uniform circular motion, the acceleration is the _______ acceleration.
An object in non-uniform circular motion has a _______ acceleration that is the vector sum of the centripetal acceleration and the tangential acceleration.
The SI unit of angular velocity is _______.
A _______ body is a body that does not deform or change shape.
The SI unit of tangential acceleration is _______.
The angular acceleration gives rise to the _______ acceleration that is tangential to the circle.
The SI unit of linear velocity is _______.
The direction of the angular velocity is usually specified by the _______ rule.
In _______ motion, the object rotates about an axis.
When the angular velocity is _______ the angular acceleration and the angular velocity have the same direction.
The ratio of the linear displacement to the angular displacement of a body in circular motion is the _______ of the circular path.
The tangential acceleration of a rotating object is a measure of how fast the tangential _______ changes.
All particles of an object rotating around the axis of rotation move in a _______ path.
If the angular velocity changes at a constant rate, the angular acceleration is _______.
In a _______ circular motion, there are tangential acceleration and centripetal acceleration.
The centripetal acceleration is in the _______ direction.
When the angular velocity is _______ the angular acceleration and the angular velocity have opposite directions.
The SI unit of angular displacement is _______.
If the angular speed is increasing, the directions of tangential velocity and tangential acceleration are _______.
In a circular motion, the object just moves in a _______.
The tangential acceleration is in the _______ direction.
In a non-uniform circular motion, an object moves in a circular path with a _______ speed.
In the right-hand rule for the direction of angular velocity, the thumb points in the direction of _______.
A rigid body is a body that does not deform or change _______.
The motion of artificial satellites going around the earth at a constant height is an example of _______ motion.
A rigid body is a body that does not _______ or change shape.
If the angular speed is decreasing, the directions of tangential velocity and tangential acceleration are _______.
